mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_BASIC ( LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USER_STATUS, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{email}, #{phoneNo}, #{password}, #{name}, #{genderCode}, #{birthDate}, #{userStatus}, #{insertUserId} )

INSERT INTO USER_DETAIL ( USER_ID, FRIEND_MESSAGE_AVAIL_YN, CONFIRM_YN_1, CONFIRM_YN_2, CONFIRM_YN_3, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendMessageAvailYN}, #{confirmYN1}, #{confirmYN2}, #{confirmYN3}, #{insertUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PHONE_NO, PASSWORD, NAME, GENDER_CODE, BIRTH_DATE, USER_STATUS, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_ID, UPDATE_DT FROM USER_BASIC WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMAIL_AUTH (USER_ID, EMAIL_AUTH_CODE, AUTH_STATUS, EXPIRED_DT, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, UPDATE_USER_ID) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{authCode}, '1', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL )

INSERT INTO EMAIL_AUTH ( AUTH_ID, EMAIL_AUTH_CODE, AUTH_STATUS, EXPIRED_DT, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{authId}, #{authCode}, '1', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTH_STATUS = 2;
mapper.select: SELECT AUTH_ID, USER_ID, EMAIL_AUTH_CODE, AUTH_STATUS, EXPIRED_DT, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, INSERT_DT, UPDATE_USER_ID, UPDATE_DT FROM EMAIL_AUTH WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND EMAIL_AUTH_CODE = #{authCode}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO EMAIL_AUTH ( AUTH_ID, EMAIL_AUTH_CODE, AUTH_STATUS, EXPIRED_DT, REMARKS, INSERT_USER_ID, UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{authId}, #{authCode}, '1', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE AUTH_STATUS = 3, EXPIRED_DT = #{expTime};
